payload.task: Write a Python function that calculates the factorial of a number. Include error handling and unit tests.
Implement a Stack data structure in Python with push, pop, and peek methods. Write comprehensive unit tests covering edge cases.
Explain the quicksort algorithm step-by-step, implement it in Python, and provide a comparison with merge sort in terms of time complexity.
Design a REST API for a TODO application. Include endpoint specifications, request/response schemas, error handling codes, and authentication strategy.
Design a database schema for an e-commerce platform. Include tables for users, products, orders, and reviews. Provide SQL CREATE statements and explain relationships.
Write a secure authentication module using JWT tokens. Include login, token refresh, and logout endpoints. Explain security best practices.
Explain overfitting and underfitting in machine learning. Include examples, visualization descriptions, and techniques to prevent overfitting.
Build a simple linear regression model in Python using scikit-learn. Include data loading, model training, evaluation metrics, and visualization code.
Explain how convolutional neural networks (CNNs) work. Include architecture components (convolution, pooling, activation), a simple implementation, and real-world applications.
Design a microservices architecture for a social media platform. Include service decomposition, API gateways, message queues, and deployment strategy.
Design a caching strategy for a high-traffic e-commerce website. Compare Redis vs Memcached, explain cache invalidation strategies, and provide implementation code.
Explain different load balancing algorithms (round-robin, least connections, IP hash). Compare their trade-offs and recommend for different scenarios.
Design an ETL pipeline that ingests JSON logs, transforms them, and loads into a data warehouse. Include pseudocode and error handling strategy.
Write a data quality validation framework. Include checks for missing values, duplicates, outliers, and schema validation. Provide Python implementation.
Write SQL queries to analyze user behavior data. Include daily active users, retention rate, churn rate, and cohort analysis queries.
Create a complete blog application: 1) Backend API with authentication, 2) Database schema, 3) Frontend React components, 4) API documentation, 5) Deployment guide.
Analyze and optimize this Python code: [includes nested loops and inefficient algorithms]. Profile the code, identify bottlenecks, implement improvements, and benchmark the results.
Review this web application code for security vulnerabilities. Identify SQL injection risks, XSS vulnerabilities, CSRF tokens, authentication flaws, and provide remediation steps.
Write comprehensive technical documentation for a Python library. Include installation, usage examples, API reference, FAQ, and troubleshooting guide.
Analyze three competing products in the SaaS market. Create comparison matrix, identify pricing strategies, analyze strength/weaknesses, and recommend positioning.
Summarize a machine learning research paper: explain key concepts, methodology, results, implications, and potential applications in industry.
Create a comprehensive guide covering: 1) Distributed systems theory, 2) CAP theorem, 3) Consistency models, 4) Real-world case studies, 5) Implementation patterns. Make it encyclopedic.
Discuss the trade-offs between security and privacy in web applications. Present multiple perspectives and provide a balanced analysis.
Design a system to detect and prevent fraud in real-time financial transactions. Include machine learning models, rule engines, and human review workflows.
